Actually `getFormatter` from `next-intl/server` uses the locale from the request context, so the date formatting should already be localized.

    10→export async function NoteLatestRender({ note }: { note: NoteModel }) {
    11→  const href = buildNotePath(note)
    12→  const coverSrc = note.meta?.cover as string | undefined
    13→  const format = await getFormatter()
    14→  const date = new Date(note.created)
    15→
    16→  return (
    17→    <div className="mt-6">
    18→      {(note.weather || note.mood) && (
    19→        <div className="mb-2.5 flex items-center gap-2 text-xs">
    20→          {note.weather && (
    21→            <span className="text-neutral-6">{note.weather}</span>
    22→          )}
    23→          {note.mood && <span className="text-neutral-6">{note.mood}</span>}
    24→        </div>
    25→      )}
    26→
    27→      <h1 className="mb-1.5 text-2xl font-bold tracking-tight text-neutral-9 lg:text-[28px]">
    28→        <Link className="hover:text-accent transition-colors" href={href}>
    29→          {note.title}
    30→        </Link>
    31→      </h1>
    32→
    33→      <div className="mb-6 text-xs text-neutral-6">
    34→        {format.dateTime(date, {
    35→          year: 'numeric',
    36→          month: 'long',
    37→          day: 'numeric',
    38→          weekday: 'short',
    39→        })}{' '}
    40→        · <span className="text-neutral-6">#{note.nid}</span>
    41→      </div>
    42→
    43→      {coverSrc && (
    44→        <Link className="mb-6 block overflow-hidden rounded-lg" href={href}>
    45→          <img
    46→            alt={note.title}
    47→            className="w-full object-cover transition-transform duration-300 hover:scale-[1.02]"
    48→            src={coverSrc}
    49→            style={{ maxHeight: '280px' }}
    50→          />
    51→        </Link>
    52→      )}
    53→
    54→      <div className="relative">
    55→        <div className="max-h-[calc(100vh-40rem)] overflow-hidden">
    56→          {note.contentFormat === 'lexical' && note.content ? (
    57→            <article className="relative">
    58→              <LexicalContent content={note.content} variant="note" />
    59→            </article>
    60→          ) : note.text ? (
    61→            <article className="prose relative">
    62→              <Markdown
    63→                removeWrapper={false}
    64→                value={note.text}
    65→                variant="note"
    66→              />
    67→            </article>
    68→          ) : null}
    69→        </div>
    70→
    71→        <div className="pointer-events-none absolute inset-x-0 bottom-0 h-[120px] bg-gradient-to-b from-transparent via-white/85 to-white/98 dark:via-neutral-1/85 dark:to-neutral-1/98" />
    72→      </div>
    73→
    74→      <div className="mt-1 text-center">
    75→        <Link
    76→          className="text-sm font-medium text-accent transition-colors hover:text-accent/80"
    77→          href={href}
    78→        >
    79→          阅读全文 →
    80→        </Link>
    81→      </div>
    82→    </div>
    83→  )
    84→}
    85→
